description: Earn 1 donut for the first time.
THe begining of your delicious journey!
Keep clicking to find out what is next!
Earn 100 donuts for the first time.
You have enough donuts to start selling them!
Congrats, but there is still a long way to go!
Earn 1000 donuts for the first time.
WOW! You are good at making those donuts!
Keep going higher and higher!
Earn 10,000 donuts for the first time.
Now you are a true master of donuts!
Carry on selling those delicious treats!
Earn 100,000 donuts for the first time.
You are now a legend in the world of donuts!
Congratulations on your first 100k!
Earn 1,000,000 donuts for the first time.
You are now a god of donuts!
There is no limit to your donut power!
Earn 10 million donuts for the first time.
You finally backed your first million donuts!
You becomed first multimillionare with donuts!
Earn 1 billion donuts for the first time.
Nothing to say, you are a billionaire now!
Now you can concure the world!
Earn 1 trillion donuts for the first time.
Now can build unbetable donut imperium!
Is there anything else you can achieve?
